example: The Spring Festival brings families together to share warmth and stories.
memoryTip: fes-ti-val：节日就是大家聚在一起庆祝（fes-tive）的时刻。

posDetails.example: The Spring Festival brings families together to share warmth and stories.
posDetails.exampleCn: 春节让家人团聚，分享温暖与故事。

example: Public speaking helped me find my voice when I felt invisible.
memoryTip: speak + ing：说话的能力（-ing 名词化）。

posDetails.example: Public speaking helped me find my voice when I felt invisible.
posDetails.exampleCn: 当众演讲帮助我在感到被忽视时找到了自己的声音。

example: I will keep trying, even when no one sees my effort.
memoryTip: will：心中有一个意志（will），所以将来一定会做到。

posDetails.example: I will keep trying, even when no one sees my effort.
posDetails.exampleCn: 即使没人看见我的努力，我也会继续坚持。

example: I am learning to be kind to myself, not just to others.
memoryTip: I：字母 I 就像一个人站立的样子，代表自我。

posDetails.example: I am learning to be kind to myself, not just to others.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我正在学习善待自己，而不仅仅是对他人友善。

example: A textbook can teach facts, but life teaches wisdom.
memoryTip: text + book：写满文字（text）的书（book）就是课本。

posDetails.example: A textbook can teach facts, but life teaches wisdom.
posDetails.exampleCn: 教科书能教给我们知识，但生活教会我们智慧。

example: Her careful pronunciation showed respect for every language she spoke.
memoryTip: pro-nun-ci-a-tion：发出（pro-）声音的方式。

posDetails.example: Her careful pronunciation showed respect for every language she spoke.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她认真的发音体现了对每一种所说语言的尊重。

phrases: freedom of expression 言论自由
example: A smile is the most honest expression of a brave heart.
memoryTip: ex-press-ion：把内心压（press）出来的东西就是表达。

posDetails.example: A smile is the most honest expression of a brave heart.
posDetails.exampleCn: 微笑是一颗勇敢的心最真诚的表达。

example: Grammar is not a cage but a bridge between cultures.
memoryTip: gram-mar：Grandma（奶奶）也懂语法，因为语言是传承。

posDetails.example: Grammar is not a cage but a bridge between cultures.
posDetails.exampleCn: 语法不是牢笼，而是文化之间的桥梁。

example: A true pal listens not to reply, but to understand.
memoryTip: pal：朋友就是能互相拍肩膀的人。

posDetails.example: A true pal listens not to reply, but to understand.
posDetails.exampleCn: 真正的朋友倾听不是为了回应，而是为了理解。

example: Chemistry reveals the hidden beauty inside every leaf and drop of water.
memoryTip: chem-is-try：化学就是不断尝试（try）的学科。

posDetails.example: Chemistry reveals the hidden beauty inside every leaf and drop of water.
posDetails.exampleCn: 化学揭示了每一片叶子和每一滴水中隐藏的美。

phrases: on the increase 在增长中
example: Small acts of kindness can increase the warmth of an entire community.
memoryTip: in-crease：往里（in）折（crease）叠，数量就增加了。

posDetails.example: We should increase our understanding of different cultures through travel.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们应该通过旅行来增加对不同文化的理解。

posDetails.example: There has been a slow increase in his confidence this year.
posDetails.exampleCn: 今年他的自信心有了缓慢的增长。

example: She was born with a curiosity that never faded.
memoryTip: born：bear（出生）的过去分词，天生带来的。

posDetails.example: She was born with a curiosity that never faded.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她天生就带着一份永不消退的好奇心。

phrases: use your brain 动动脑筋
example: The brain grows stronger when we face challenges with courage.
memoryTip: brain：b + rain（雨），大脑像下雨一样不断产生想法。

posDetails.example: The brain grows stronger when we face challenges with courage.
posDetails.exampleCn: 当我们勇敢面对挑战时，大脑会变得更加强大。

example: Music can connect two strangers without a single word.
memoryTip: con-nect：共同（con）联结（nect），就是连接。

posDetails.example: Music can connect two strangers without a single word.
posDetails.exampleCn: 音乐能在不说一句话的情况下连接两个陌生人。

example: Lifelong learning keeps our minds young and open.
memoryTip: life + long：像生命一样长，就是终身的。

posDetails.example: Lifelong learning keeps our minds young and open.
posDetails.exampleCn: 终身学习让我们的头脑保持年轻和开放。

phrases: have a conversation 进行一次谈话
example: A real conversation is when both people feel heard and seen.
memoryTip: con-ver-sa-tion：共同（con）翻转（vers）思想，就是交谈。

posDetails.example: A real conversation is when both people feel heard and seen.
posDetails.exampleCn: 真正的交谈是当双方都感到被倾听和被看见的时候。

example: Reading aloud helps us feel the rhythm and soul of a language.
memoryTip: a + loud：发出 loud（大声的）声音，就是 aloud。

posDetails.example: Reading aloud helps us feel the rhythm and soul of a language.
posDetails.exampleCn: 大声朗读帮助我们感受一种语言的节奏和灵魂。

phrases: be patient with 对……有耐心
a patient teacher 一位有耐心的老师
example: The patient teacher saw potential in every quiet student.
memoryTip: pa-tient：拍（pa）着学生的头，就是有耐心的老师。

posDetails.example: The patient teacher saw potential in every quiet student.
posDetails.exampleCn: 这位有耐心的老师在每个安静的学生身上都看到了潜力。

posDetails.example: The patient waited quietly, trusting the doctor's care.
posDetails.exampleCn: 病人安静地等待，信任医生的照料。

phrases: discover the truth 发现真相
example: We discover ourselves not by looking inward alone, but by reaching out to the world.
memoryTip: dis-cover：揭开（dis-）覆盖物（cover），就是发现。

posDetails.example: We discover ourselves not by looking inward alone, but by reaching out to the world.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们发现自己不是只靠内省，而是通过向外界伸出手。

phrases: keep a secret 保守秘密
example: The secret to true friendship is showing up, even on hard days.
memoryTip: se-cret：分开（se-）隐藏（cret），就是秘密。

posDetails.example: The secret to true friendship is showing up, even on hard days.
posDetails.exampleCn: 真正友谊的秘诀是即使在艰难的日子也出现。

posDetails.example: She shared her secret dream of becoming a photographer.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她分享了自己成为摄影师的秘密梦想。

phrases: repeat after me 跟我重复
history repeats itself 历史重演
example: We must repeat acts of kindness until they become habits.
memoryTip: re-peat：再次（re-）做（peat），就是重复。

posDetails.example: We must repeat acts of kindness until they become habits.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们必须重复善意的行为，直到它们成为习惯。

posDetails.example: The repeat of that beautiful melody brought tears to her eyes.
posDetails.exampleCn: 那段美妙旋律的重复让她热泪盈眶。

phrases: make a note of 记录下
example: She wrote a note of encouragement and left it on my desk.
memoryTip: note：音似"诺特"，记笔记就是承诺自己不会忘记。

posDetails.example: She wrote a note of encouragement and left it on my desk.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她写了一张鼓励的便条，放在了我的桌上。

posDetails.example: I note that every small act of kindness leaves a mark on the world.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我注意到每一个小小的善举都会在世界上留下印记。

example: Physics teaches us that every action creates a reaction in the universe.
memoryTip: phy-sics：物理研究物质（phy-sical）的科学（-ics）。

posDetails.example: Physics teaches us that every action creates a reaction in the universe.
posDetails.exampleCn: 物理学教会我们，每一个动作都会在宇宙中产生反应。

phrases: memorize a poem 背诵一首诗
example: I do not just memorize words; I try to feel their stories.
memoryTip: mem-o-rize：记忆（mem-ory）让它（-ize）成为自己的。

posDetails.example: I do not just memorize words; I try to feel their stories.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我不只是记住单词；我试着感受它们的故事。

example: The speed of growth matters less than the direction of growth.
memoryTip: speed：像飞（sp）一样快（eed），就是速度。

posDetails.example: The speed of growth matters less than the direction of growth.
posDetails.exampleCn: 成长的速度不如成长的方向重要。

posDetails.example: Time seems to speed up when we are truly present in the moment.
posDetails.exampleCn: 当我们真正活在当下时，时间似乎会加速。

example: A good partner does not walk ahead or behind, but beside you.
memoryTip: part-ner：参与（part）你人生的人（-ner），就是搭档。

posDetails.example: A good partner does not walk ahead or behind, but beside you.
posDetails.exampleCn: 一个好的搭档不会走在前面或后面，而是走在你旁边。

phrases: have the ability to 有能力做
example: The ability to listen is often greater than the ability to speak.
memoryTip: a-bil-i-ty：能够（a-ble）的状态（-ity），就是能力。

posDetails.example: The ability to listen is often greater than the ability to speak.
posDetails.exampleCn: 倾听的能力往往大于说话的能力。

example: We create our own sunshine on rainy days through hope and action.
memoryTip: cre-ate：生长（cre-）出来（-ate），就是创造。

posDetails.example: We create our own sunshine on rainy days through hope and action.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们通过希望和行动在雨天创造自己的阳光。

phrases: take an active part in 积极参加
active lifestyle 积极的生活方式
example: An active mind sees opportunities where others see obstacles.
memoryTip: act-ive：行动（act）的状态（-ive），就是活跃的。

posDetails.example: An active mind sees opportunities where others see obstacles.
posDetails.exampleCn: 活跃的头脑在别人看到障碍的地方看到机会。

example: Before moving forward, I like to review the path I have walked.
memoryTip: re-view：再次（re-）看（view），就是回顾。

posDetails.example: Before moving forward, I like to review the path I have walked.
posDetails.exampleCn: 在向前迈进之前，我喜欢回顾自己走过的路。

posDetails.example: The book review opened my eyes to a world I had never imagined.
posDetails.exampleCn: 这篇书评让我看到了一个我从未想象过的世界。

phrases: knowledge is power 知识就是力量
example: Knowledge becomes wisdom only when it touches the heart.
memoryTip: know-ledge：知道（know）的边界（-ledge），就是知识。

posDetails.example: Knowledge becomes wisdom only when it touches the heart.
posDetails.exampleCn: 知识只有触碰到心灵时才会变成智慧。

example: She wisely chose to listen before judging a quiet classmate.
memoryTip: wise + ly：wise（明智的）+ ly（副词后缀），就是明智地。

posDetails.example: She wisely chose to listen before judging a quiet classmate.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她明智地选择在评判一个安静的同学之前先倾听。

phrases: loud and clear 清晰响亮
example: Her loud laughter filled the room with warmth and light.
memoryTip: loud：音似" loud "，本身就是响亮的意思。

posDetails.example: Her loud laughter filled the room with warmth and light.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她响亮的笑声让房间充满了温暖和光明。

posDetails.example: Speak loud enough so that even the quietest voice feels heard.
posDetails.exampleCn: 说得足够大声，让即使最安静的声音也能被听见。

phrases: keep a secret 保守秘密
example: Every flower has a secret language that only patient hearts can read.
memoryTip: se-cret：分开（se-）隐藏（cret），就是秘密。

posDetails.example: Every flower has a secret language that only patient hearts can read.
posDetails.exampleCn: 每一朵花都有自己的秘密语言，只有耐心的心才能读懂。

posDetails.example: He kept his secret garden behind the old house.
posDetails.exampleCn: 他在老房子后面保留着自己秘密的花园。

phrases: discover new things 发现新事物
example: To discover the beauty of Yunnan, one must walk slowly and look closely.
memoryTip: dis-cover：揭开（dis-）覆盖物（cover），就是发现。

posDetails.example: To discover the beauty of Yunnan, one must walk slowly and look closely.
posDetails.exampleCn: 要发现云南的美，必须慢慢地走，细细地看。

phrases: invent a machine 发明机器
example: We do not need to invent a new world; we just need to see this one with fresh eyes.
memoryTip: in-vent：走进（in-）来 vent（通风口），就是发明新通道。

posDetails.example: We do not need to invent a new world; we just need to see this one with fresh eyes.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们不需要发明一个新世界；我们只需要用新鲜的眼睛看待这个世界。

example: I find courage not in being fearless, but in moving forward despite fear.
memoryTip: find：寻找（find）就是发现（find）的过程。

posDetails.example: I find courage not in being fearless, but in moving forward despite fear.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我发现勇气不是无所畏惧，而是尽管害怕仍然前进。

phrases: on the increase 在增长中
example: Small acts of kindness can increase the warmth of an entire community.
memoryTip: in-crease：往里（in）折（crease）叠，数量就增加了。

posDetails.example: Small acts of kindness can increase the warmth of an entire community.
posDetails.exampleCn: 小小的善举可以增加整个社区的温度。

posDetails.example: There has been a steady increase in students who love reading aloud.
posDetails.exampleCn: 热爱大声朗读的学生数量一直在稳步增长。

phrases: have the ability to 有能力做
example: The ability to forgive is the ability to set yourself free.
memoryTip: a-bil-i-ty：能够（a-ble）的状态（-ity），就是能力。

posDetails.example: The ability to forgive is the ability to set yourself free.
posDetails.exampleCn: 原谅的能力就是让自己自由的能力。

phrases: It's time to 是时候……了
example: It's never too late to become the person you want to be.
memoryTip: It's = It is：它是，两个词缩写成带撇号的一个词。

posDetails.example: It's never too late to become the person you want to be.
posDetails.exampleCn: 成为你想成为的人，永远不会太晚。

example: She spoke in a loud voice so that everyone in the back could hear her story.
memoryTip: in a loud voice：用响亮的声音，就是大声地。

posDetails.example: She spoke in a loud voice so that everyone in the back could hear her story.
posDetails.exampleCn: 她大声说话，让后排的每个人都能听到她的故事。

phrases: by the way 顺便说一下
example: We grow not by comparing ourselves to others, but by comparing ourselves to who we were yesterday.
memoryTip: by：在旁边（by），通过（by），被（by）——多面手介词。

posDetails.example: We grow not by comparing ourselves to others, but by comparing ourselves to who we were yesterday.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我们的成长不是通过与他人比较，而是通过与昨天的自己比较。

example: By mistake, I sent the encouraging message to the wrong person, but it turned out to be exactly what they needed.
memoryTip: by + mistake：通过错误的方式，就是错误地。

posDetails.example: By mistake, I sent the encouraging message to the wrong person, but it turned out to be exactly what they needed.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我错误地把鼓励的信息发错了人，但结果那恰好是他们需要的。

example: Since that rainy afternoon, I have learned to find beauty in every storm.
memoryTip: since：从那时（sin-ce）起，一直到现在。

posDetails.example: Since that rainy afternoon, I have learned to find beauty in every storm.
posDetails.exampleCn: 自从那个下雨的下午，我学会了在每一场暴风雨中发现美。

posDetails.example: Since we all make mistakes, we should learn to forgive each other.
posDetails.exampleCn: 既然我们都会犯错，我们就应该学会互相原谅。

example: For every door that closes, another one opens with new possibilities.
memoryTip: for：为了（for）梦想，我们不断前行。

posDetails.example: For every door that closes, another one opens with new possibilities.
posDetails.exampleCn: 每一扇关闭的门后面，另一扇门都会带着新的可能性打开。

example: My friend has gone to the mountains to find peace and quiet.
memoryTip: has gone to：去了还没回，人在远方。

posDetails.example: My friend has gone to the mountains to find peace and quiet.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我的朋友去了山里寻找平静与安宁。

example: I have been to Lijiang, where time moves as gently as the ancient canals.
memoryTip: has been to：去过已回，有经验了。

posDetails.example: I have been to Lijiang, where time moves as gently as the ancient canals.
posDetails.exampleCn: 我去过丽江，在那里时间像古老的运河一样缓缓流淌。
